OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-22-2007 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: JPT Gilbert Jay, Clerk Karissa Shaw, Reporter Susan Lee/Not Reported. (218/206)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Carl Marshall is present.
Daniel Stern representing the plaintiff.

Defendant Huey Fotiu is present.
Erin L. Rothfuss representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. JPT, counsel and parties meet privately for settlement discussions.

Although Mr. Stern told the clerk at the time of check-in that Mr. Marshall was present, the clerk is later informed that the plaintiff is not here. Mr. David Wasserman is claiming to be Mr. Marshall's 'agent' and Mr. Daniel Stern is claiming to be the plaintiff's attorney.
Mr. Stern has asserted to Ms. Gold, the Limited Scope Attorney Coordinator, that the plaintiff is out of town and unable to appear. Both attorneys are partners in the same law firm.

The Pro Tem informed the clerk that Mr. Stern was also acting as plaintiff's counsel in Mosser v. Errisuriz (#621948). Mr. Wasserman had checked-in with the clerk as being the plaintiff's attorney in this case.

Case did not settle, trial date remains set.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-05-2007 Continued To Jun-25-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
